uplink.description: Status report with shock/tamper alarm active (motion detected)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (devtype 271 = 0x010F) and normalizing its fields. Shock/tamper alarm byte = 1 -> action.motion.detected true.

uplink.description: Status report, no alarm, low battery, negative soil temperature (motion not detected)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. byte[4] high bit set -> lowBattery; bytes[7..8]=0xFF9C two's-complement -> -1.00 C; tamper byte = 0 -> action.motion.detected false.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame (reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic; reportType byte (index 3) = 0 is the device-info/version frame, no measurement.

uplink.description: Config-response fPort (23) is not a data report
uplink._note: Synthetic; fPort 23 carries config-command echoes (incl. DryContactPointOut), not a measurement.
